THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF M. DATTANI CREDIT TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VENEGOS, FLORA JONES, EDWARD J. III THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3246 22ND ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA, SEE SCANNED DOC. EDWARD JONES III IS NOT A CO-OCCUPANT OF THE UNIT UNDER SF RENT STABILIZATION & ARBITRATION BOARD REGULATION 6.14, DEFTS ARE ESTOPPED FROM ASSERTING THAT EDWARD JONES III RESIDED IN THE PREMISES IN JAN. 1999 AND DOES NOT QUALIFY AS HAVING RESIDED IN THE UNIT PRIOR TO JAN. 1, 1996 FOR THE PURPOSE OF CCP 1954.52.
